payment.authorizedBody: Your payment is authorized (capture happens when we fulfill the order). Tap below to place your order — you will not be charged again at checkout.

gateways.noneBody: To accept payments, install a payment app (like Saleor Dummy Payment for testing, or Stripe/Adyen for production) from the Saleor Dashboard.
gateways.unsupportedList: This checkout does not support the available payment gateway(s): {gateways}.
gateways.unsupportedEmpty: No supported payment gateway is available for this checkout.
gateways.dummyMissingTitle: Dummy Payment not available on this checkout
gateways.dummyMissingBody: Dummy Payment App is installed, but it is not available for this checkout. In Saleor Dashboard, check the app is active, webhooks are delivering successfully, and the checkout currency is supported (USD for the hosted app).
gateways.noGatewayConfigured: No payment gateway configured. Please contact support or configure a payment app in Saleor.
gateways.stripeUseCardForm: Stripe payment is handled by the card form. Complete payment using the Stripe payment section above.
gateways.paymentWebhookFailed: Payment app webhook failed. In Saleor Dashboard → Apps → Dummy Payment App, check webhook deliveries are succeeding.
gateways.paymentInitFailed: Payment could not be initialized. Check that the payment app is running in Saleor.

about.metaDescription: Learn about AnFully's mission, vision, and commitment to providing quality electronic components.
about.heroDesc: AnFully is a technology enterprise specializing in electronic component distribution and supply chain services. We are committed to providing high-quality, cost-effective passive components, semiconductor devices and one-stop procurement solutions for the global electronics manufacturing industry.
about.missionDesc: Leveraging global manufacturer resources to provide stable, compliant and cost-effective electronic component supply for manufacturing customers, with complete technical selection, quality control and on-site delivery one-stop services, solving customer pain points in material shortage, selection and quality control.
about.visionDesc: To deeply cultivate the passive component and IC distribution track, excel in MLCC, resistors, inductors and IC full categories, building a trusted component distribution platform with technical service capability, inventory assurance and compliance system, becoming a long-term trusted supply chain partner for customers.
about.value1Desc: All materials directly sourced from manufacturers, traceable to original batches and COA; no false parameters, no hidden defects, building long-term customer trust; transparent pricing, no arbitrary quotes or malicious bidding.
about.value2Desc: Equipped with manufacturer-certified engineers providing selection alternatives, Datasheet interpretation, circuit optimization technical support; full coverage of MLCC, resistors, inductors, IC categories with specialized teams; regular internal training and manufacturer technical exchanges to maintain industry-leading knowledge.
about.value3Desc: Building digital platforms for online component search, intelligent quoting, real-time inventory inquiry to streamline customer procurement; introducing smart warehousing and barcode traceability to improve shipping and inventory efficiency; exploring flexible cooperation models such as elastic credit terms and VMI consignment for SME customers.
about.value4Desc: Linking upstream manufacturers for stable supply, ensuring downstream customer delivery, balancing development of employees, customers and suppliers; building long-term strategic cooperation with customers, sharing market information and inventory resources; employee equity incentives and growth training to build a stable and efficient team.
about.servicePhilosophyDesc: Do our best to meet customer needs; urgent orders prioritized, difficult selections handled by dedicated personnel, quality issues quickly closed loop.
about.businessPhilosophyDesc: Long-termism, quality first, technology empowerment, efficient delivery.
about.companyIntroDesc1: AnFully Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2015, headquartered in Shenzhen, with branch offices in Taiwan, Hong Kong, Shanghai and other locations. The company focuses on electronic component distribution and has established long-term stable partnerships with world-renowned brands such as Murata, TDK, Samsung and YAGEO.
about.companyIntroDesc2: After years of development, AnFully has grown into a leading passive component distributor in South China, serving over 3,000 customers across consumer electronics, communications equipment, automotive electronics, industrial control, medical equipment and other industries.
about.advantage1: Authorized distributor, 100% genuine guarantee, traceable source
about.advantage2: Over 100,000 SKUs in stock, covering mainstream brands and models
about.advantage3: Shenzhen and Hong Kong dual warehouses, 1-3 day fast shipping
about.advantage4: Professional FAE technical support team providing selection guidance
about.advantage5: Flexible supply chain financial solutions to reduce customer capital pressure
about.advantage6: Comprehensive after-sales service system, hassle-free returns
about.app1Desc: Capacitors, resistors, inductors for smartphones, tablets, wearables, smart home products.
about.app2Desc: Component supply for 5G base stations, routers, optical communication equipment, servers.
about.app3Desc: Passive components for in-vehicle entertainment, ADAS, new energy vehicle electronic control systems.
about.app4Desc: Electronic components for industrial automation, instrumentation, motor drives, PLC control systems.
about.app5Desc: High-reliability components for medical monitoring, diagnostic instruments, rehabilitation equipment.
about.app6Desc: Power devices for photovoltaic inverters, energy storage systems, charging stations.

brands.metaDescription: AnFully is an authorized distributor for Murata, TDK, Samsung, YAGEO and other world-renowned brands.
brands.heroDesc: As an authorized distributor for Murata, TDK, Samsung, YAGEO and other global brands, AnFully provides full range passive component products with quality assurance, abundant stock and competitive pricing.
brands.murataDesc: Murata is the world's leading ceramic electronic component manufacturer, founded in 1944 and headquartered in Kyoto, Japan. Murata holds approximately 35% of the global MLCC market share and is recognized as the technology leader in the industry.
brands.murataHighlight: Core Strengths: #1 global MLCC market share, full product line from consumer to automotive grade, excellent high-frequency characteristics, leading miniaturization technology
brands.tdkDesc: Founded in 1935 and headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, TDK is a world-renowned electronic component manufacturer. TDK possesses core technology in ferrite and magnetic materials, with its ceramic capacitors, inductors and magnetic devices enjoying high reputation in the industry.
brands.tdkHighlight: Core Strengths: World-leading ferrite material technology, high-reliability industrial-grade MLCC, rich large-capacity capacitor product line, complete automotive-grade product certifications
brands.samsungDesc: Samsung Electro-Mechanics is a subsidiary of Samsung Group specializing in electronic component manufacturing, established in 1973. As the world's second largest MLCC manufacturer, Samsung is known for massive production capacity and high cost-performance ratio, with CL series MLCC widely popular in the market.
brands.samsungHighlight: Core Strengths: #2 global MLCC market share, massive production capacity, CL series ultra-high cost-performance ratio, stable delivery and sufficient supply guarantee
brands.yageoDesc: Founded in 1977 and headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan, YAGEO is the world's largest chip resistor manufacturer. YAGEO's product line covers the full range of passive components including resistors, capacitors and inductors, with over 20 production bases and sales networks worldwide.
brands.yageoHighlight: Core Strengths: #1 global chip resistor market share, most comprehensive passive component product line, full coverage of thick/thin film resistor precision, fast delivery

news.metaDescription: Latest news and updates from AnFully.
news.news1Title: AnFully Expands Warehouse Capacity in Shenzhen
news.news1Desc: To meet growing customer demand, we have expanded our Shenzhen warehouse by 5,000 square meters, increasing stock capacity by 30%.
news.news2Title: New Partnership with Murata for Automotive MLCC
news.news2Desc: We are pleased to announce expanded partnership with Murata, now offering full range of automotive-grade MLCC products.
news.news3Desc: Analysis of current market trends in passive components, including supply chain updates and pricing forecasts.
news.news4Desc: We are proud to announce that AnFully has successfully obtained ISO 9001:2015 quality management system certification.

support.metaDescription: Get technical support and answers to frequently asked questions.
support.faq1Q: How can I verify product authenticity?
support.faq1A: All products sold by AnFully come directly from authorized manufacturers with complete COA (Certificate of Authenticity) and traceable batch numbers. You can verify authenticity through the manufacturer's official channels.
support.faq2A: We ship from both Shenzhen and Hong Kong warehouses. Standard delivery takes 1-3 business days for domestic orders. International shipping typically takes 5-10 business days depending on destination.
support.faq3Q: Do you provide technical support for component selection?
support.faq3A: Yes, our FAE (Field Application Engineering) team provides free technical support including component selection, datasheet interpretation, and circuit optimization suggestions.
support.faq4A: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery for unopened products in original packaging. For quality issues, we offer hassle-free returns and exchanges.
support.faq5Q: How do I get a quote for bulk orders?
support.faq5A: You can submit an inquiry through our online form or contact our sales team directly. We typically respond within 30 minutes during business hours.
support.faq6A: Yes, we offer free samples for qualified R&D customers. Each model is limited to 10 pieces. Please submit a sample request through our website.
support.techSupportDesc: Our FAE engineers are ready to assist you with component selection and technical questions.

inquiry.metaDescription: Submit your inquiry and get a quote within 30 minutes.
inquiry.pageSubtitle: Submit your request, get accurate quotes within 30 minutes on business days
inquiry.tip1: Average quote within 30 minutes on business days

sample.metaDescription: Apply for free samples for your R&D projects.
sample.pageSubtitle: Free sample support for R&D customers to reduce prototyping costs
sample.applicationPlaceholder: Please describe sample usage (R&D testing, prototype production, etc.)
sample.rule3: Samples are free, shipping cost paid by customer
sample.rule5: Ships within 1-3 business days after approval

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with AnFully for sales, technical support or business inquiries.
contact.heroDesc: We are here to help. Reach out to our team for any inquiries about products, technical support, or business partnerships.

footer.description: One-stop electronic components procurement platform, providing stable, compliant and cost-effective component supply services for global customers.
